taskId.description: Parent compound task ID for tracking overall progress

subTaskCount.description: Total number of sub-tasks created (one per item in the request)

statusUrl.description: Relative URL to poll the parent task status

taskId.description: Unique identifier for this sub-task (can be polled individually)

index.description: Zero-based position of this sub-task within the compound

status.description: Task lifecycle state: waiting (pending dependencies), queued (in queue), processing (actively computing), completed (result available), failed (error occurred), cancelled (user-cancelled), expired (result TTL exceeded)
status.title: TaskStatus

progress.description: Completion percentage (0–100) or null if not yet started

computeMs.description: Actual compute time in milliseconds (null until completed)

error.description: Error message if sub-task failed, null otherwise

downloadFormats.description: Available output format keys (e.g. ['glb', 'stpz']) for downloading results

items.description: Status summary for one sub-task within a compound (parallel) task
items.title: SubTaskSummary

data.description: Returned when a compound (parallel) task is accepted. Contains initial status for all sub-tasks.
data.title: CompoundTaskCreatedResult

schema.description: HTTP 202 response when a compound (parallel) task is accepted
schema.title: CompoundTaskAcceptedResponse

error.description: Structured error information with machine-readable code and optional debugging context
error.title: ErrorDetail

error.description: Structured error information with machine-readable code and optional debugging context
error.title: ErrorDetail

error.description: Structured error information with machine-readable code and optional debugging context
error.title: ErrorDetail
